title: Modeled Field Layout Library
text: Modeled Field Layout Library A Modeled Field Layout Library contains Modeled Field Layouts that can be used during development when defining fields. Characteristics Characteristics Object type code: flalib Main Development Object? Yes Part of: — Contains: Property , Modeled Field Layout Generalization: Main Development Object , Library Specializations: — Compilation Output: — Generates: — URI format: flalib:LIB Specialization The Modeled Field Layout Library specializes Main Development Object and Typed Library in the following ways: It can only contain Modeled Field Layout as child development objects. It has a fixed name of LIB . It is automatically created when the first Modeled Field Layout is created. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
